scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACK,FRONT -c blue,green "npm run dev:back" "npm run dev:front"
scripts.dev:back: npm run build -w @birthday/shared && npm run dev -w @birthday/backend
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w @birthday/shared && npm run build -w @birthday/frontend && npm run build -w @birthday/backend
scripts.party:admin: npm run build:all && ADMIN_PASSWORD="master" node apps/backend/dist/index.js --serve-static
